infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to photograph campus hazards for AI detection.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app may access your photo library when selecting hazard images.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow UPM Campus Hazard Detective to access your camera for hazard scanning.
plugins.photosPermission: Allow UPM Campus Hazard Detective to access your photos.
